title: Room Ritual
description: Arrange six statement furniture pieces in a soft-brutalist loft, customize finishes and lighting, and save, compare, or cart room plans.

prompt.objective: Build an editable apartment planner around six statement furniture pieces.

mintAssets.brief: Furniture, lighting, plants, rugs, art, and shelving.
Editorial campaign images for the six hero pieces.

experience: Drag, snap, rotate, and inspect pieces in a measured room plan.
Customize finishes and light, then save, compare, or cart plans locally.
prompt.visualDirection: Editorial soft brutalism with limewash, travertine, linen, dark timber, and ultramarine accents.

thumbnail.alt: Room Ritual apartment configurator with a furniture catalog, measured 3D room plan, and product inspector.

social.title: Room Ritual
social.description: Arrange statement furniture in a soft-brutalist loft and compare complete room plans.

image.alt: Room Ritual apartment configurator with a furniture catalog, measured 3D room plan, and product inspector.
